introSection: Hurricane (Japanese: ハリケーン) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. The ride first opened in 1996.
fullText:
Hurricane (Japanese: ハリケーン) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. The ride first opened in 1996.



White track and green supports.
